creator: freebsd@furka.zuo.cpqcorp.net
text:
Usermode ppp using tun and sio on either AlphaServer 400 4/233 or
Alpha Station 4/266 works fine for about 5 minutes, then hangs the
system completly. (no ping,no response on the console).
Can be forced by transferring data (http and ftp tried).

Fix: 

- How to force a crash with FreeBSD ?
- Make indicates that ev56 instructions are used .. those are ev4
  Systems, could that be a problem ? Could not build kernel for ev4.
How-To-Repeat: Setup user mode ppp, use ppp-link to transfer data via one of the
builtin serial ports.
Custom Kernels as well as generic kernel shows same behaviour.
